heading: Assistance relating to water supply
label: 634 Assistance relating to water supply
text: The Secretary may provide assistance to municipalities the water supply of which is adversely affected by construction carried out by the Corps of Engineers.
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 102 of Pub. L. 115–270section 2201 of this title
